body_txt: Streaking is defined by Oxford Dictionaries as an "informal run [done] naked in a public place so as to shock or amuse others". This trope has made an appearance in many forms of media since its boom in popularity in the early 1970s and has continued to be an ongoing, though uncommon, phenomenon in modern society. It is mostly associated with young adults, sports events and college campuses. The motivation can be a prank, a dare, drunken revelry or a protest (in which case the streaker may write a slogan on their body). Streaking can be separated into two types: A Super-Trope to Invisible Streaker . See also Naked People Are Funny .
